title: Run Summary
description: Schema for .metadata/summary.json — the post-run goal-status document produced by the team while finalizing tasks. Each entry corresponds to one task in tasks.json (joined by 'id'). The CLI reads this file to render the post-run summary tables (per-task goal/result, overall application status, reference documents).

taskSummaries.description: One entry per task in tasks.json that has reached a terminal state. Joined to tasks.json by 'id'.

runSummaryEntry.description: A per-task goal-status entry. The shape of 'goalStatus' is selected by 'type'.

id.description: Task id matching the corresponding task in tasks.json.

type.description: Task type discriminator matching the corresponding task type in tasks.json.

goalStatus.description: Structured goal status object. Use the per-type shape selected by 'type' from the matching $defs entry below.

risks.description: Up to 3 short, concrete residual risks introduced or left behind by this task (e.g., 'Spring upgrade still uses deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter'). Omit or use [] when there are none. Do not invent risks to fill space; do not include generic platitudes.

followUps.description: Up to 3 short, actionable items the user/team should do next (e.g., 'Pin docker base image digest', 'Add IT coverage for OAuth refresh path'). Omit or use [] when there are none.

setupBaselineGoalStatus.description: Goal status for a setupBaseline task. Populate when the task reaches a terminal state so the post-run summary can render concrete counts and link to the produced test-cases.md.

totalTestCases.description: Total number of test cases captured in the baseline spec.

passed.description: Number of baseline test cases that passed at the end of the run.

failed.description: Number of baseline test cases that failed at the end of the run.

allCasesPassed.description: Convenience boolean: whether all captured test cases passed at the end of the run. Equivalent to failed == 0 when passed/failed are both populated.

testCasesFile.description: Workspace-relative path to the produced test-cases.md file, forward-slash separated (e.g., 'src/test/test-cases/test-cases.md').

upgradeGoalStatus.description: Goal status for an upgrade task. Populate when the task reaches a terminal state.

fromVersion.description: Source version observed before the upgrade, e.g., 'Java 8', '.NET 6'.

transformGoalStatus.description: Goal status for a transform task. Populate when the task reaches a terminal state.

migrationFrom.description: Source component being replaced, e.g., 'RabbitMQ', 'AWS S3'.

migrationTo.description: Azure destination component, e.g., 'Azure Service Bus', 'Azure Blob Storage'.

securityGoalStatus.description: Goal status for a security task. Populate when the task reaches a terminal state.

cvesFixed.description: Number of CVEs fixed during this task.

cvesRemaining.description: Number of CVEs that remain unfixed after this task.

integrationTestGoalStatus.description: Goal status for an integrationTest task. Populate when the task reaches a terminal state.

totalTestCases.description: Total number of integration test cases executed.

passed.description: Number of integration test cases that passed.

failed.description: Number of integration test cases that failed.

testCasesFile.description: Workspace-relative path to the consumed test-cases.md file, forward-slash separated.

infrastructureGoalStatus.description: Goal status for an infrastructure task. Populate when the task reaches a terminal state.

provisioned.description: Whether Azure resources were successfully provisioned.

resourceGroup.description: Name of the Azure resource group used for provisioning.

containerizationGoalStatus.description: Goal status for a containerization task. Populate when the task reaches a terminal state.

imageBuilt.description: Whether the container image was successfully built.

deploymentGoalStatus.description: Goal status for a deployment task. Populate when the task reaches a terminal state.

deployed.description: Whether the application was successfully deployed to the target Azure service.

resourceGroup.description: Name of the Azure resource group the application was deployed into.

accessUrl.description: Public URL or endpoint the user can use to access the deployed application.
